name: Destruction Sword Memories
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>破</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>は</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>壊</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>剣</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>けん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>追</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>つい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>憶</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Discard 1 "Destruction Sword" card; Special Summon 1 "Buster Blader" monster from the Deck. You can banish this card from your GY; Fusion Summon 1 "Buster Blader, the Dragon Destroyer Swordsman" from your Extra Deck, by banishing its Fusion Materials from your GY.
eff: Discard 1 "Destruction Sword" card; Special Summon 1 "Buster Blader" monster from the Deck. You can banish this card from your GY; Fusion Summon 1 "Buster Blader, the Dragon Destroyer Swordsman" from your Extra Deck, by banishing its Fusion Materials from your GY.

mentions: Buster Blader, the Dragon Destroyer Swordsman
action: Uses cards in the player's Graveyard as Fusion Materials
summoning: Special Summons from your Extra Deck
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
Banishes Fusion Materials used in a Fusion Summon
